violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Microwave needs cleaned in baking area.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. Handwashing sink across from Walk-in-Cooler has porcelin missing that needs repaired or replaced.

General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Back door has a severe gap at the bottom that needs repaired to working order.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
